name: Maya
backstory: Sophomore studying communications. Diagnosed with ADHD at 16 but never got consistent support. Works two part-time jobs. Chronically behind on readings but does well on presentations when interested in the topic.
emotional_triggers: group projects where she feels like dead weight
falling behind and not knowing how to catch up
existing_strengths: Hyperfocuses when genuinely interested. Excellent verbal communicator. Comes alive in discussions.
what_success_looks_like: Leaves with one concrete thing to do today, not a five-step plan she will abandon by tomorrow.
